tests.test_name: Uploading a test case file with no test cases shows an error toast
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Analyze page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user uploads a BDD file containing no scenarios and expects an error toast confirming no test cases were found, with the input box remaining empty.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Uploading a test case file with no test cases shows an error toast
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a BDD fixture file that contains no scenarios
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: An error toast appears with 'No test cases found' and the test case box is empty

tests.test_name: Uploading a test case file in the wrong format shows a warning toast with suggestion
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Analyze page before each scenario runs.

rows.mismatch_phrase: doesn't look like a BDD / Gherkin file
doesn't look like a Robot Framework
doesn't look like a Playwright file
doesn't look like a Cypress file
doesn't look like a Swift / XCTest

tests.journey: A user uploads a file whose format does not match the selected parser and expects a warning toast identifying the mismatch and suggesting the correct format, while the file content is still loaded into the input box.

test_coverage_matrix.example: bdd selected, Robot Framework file uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a Robot Framework fixture file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Warning toast appears citing BDD/Gherkin mismatch with a Robot Framework suggestion, and the test case box is populated

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Format is set to Robot Framework
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a Playwright fixture file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Warning toast appears citing Robot Framework mismatch with a Playwright suggestion, and the test case box is populated

test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a BDD fixture file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Warning toast appears citing Playwright mismatch with a BDD/Gherkin suggestion, and the test case box is populated

test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a BDD fixture file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Warning toast appears citing Cypress mismatch with a BDD/Gherkin suggestion, and the test case box is populated

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Format is set to Swift / XCTest
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a Playwright fixture file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Warning toast appears citing Swift/XCTest mismatch with a Playwright suggestion, and the test case box is populated

test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a BDD fixture file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Warning toast appears citing Espresso mismatch with a BDD/Gherkin suggestion, and the test case box is populated

tests.test_name: Uploading a valid test case file shows no toast
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Analyze page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user uploads a Playwright file that correctly matches the selected format and expects no toast to appear while the content loads successfully into the input box.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Uploading a valid test case file shows no toast
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a matching Playwright fixture file
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: No toast is displayed and the test case box is populated

tests.test_name: Pasting content that exceeds the character limit shows an error and does not load the box
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Analyze page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user pastes content exceeding the 100,000-character limit into the test case box and expects a paste error indicating the content is too long, with the input box remaining empty.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Pasting content that exceeds the character limit shows an error and does not load the box
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User pastes 100,001 characters into the test case box
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A paste error containing 'too long' is shown and the test case box remains empty

tests.test_name: Pasting valid matching content shows no toast
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Analyze page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user pastes the contents of a valid BDD file that matches the selected format and expects no toast while the content loads successfully into the input box.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Pasting valid matching content shows no toast
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User pastes the contents of a valid BDD fixture file into the test case box
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: No toast is displayed and the test case box is populated

tests.test_name: Warning toast dismisses and content remains loaded
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Analyze page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user uploads a mismatched file, receives a warning toast, dismisses it, and expects the file content to remain loaded in the input box.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Warning toast dismisses and content remains loaded
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Format is set to Robot Framework and a mismatched Playwright file has been uploaded, producing a warning toast
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The test case box remains populated after the toast is dismissed

tests.test_name: Dropping multiple test case files in single-file mode shows a dismissible warning
tests.feature: Test case file validation on the Analyze page

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates the user to the Analyze page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user drops multiple files onto the test case input while in single-file mode, sees a dismissible warning prompting them to switch to multi-file mode, and can dismiss it to clear the message.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Dropping multiple test case files in single-file mode shows a dismissible warning
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Format is set to BDD and the page is in single-file mode
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User drops multiple files onto the test case input, then clicks the dismiss button on the warning
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A warning message advising multi-file mode is shown with a dismiss button and an empty test case box; after dismissal the warning is no longer visible
